title: Director Strategic Projects (m/f/d)
required_skills: Bachelor's or Master's degree in Business Administration or related field
Minimum 3 years experience in Business Development, preferably in gaming industry
Strong leadership and strategic thinking skills
Proven experience designing and implementing projects
Excellent communication abilities — interpersonal and pitches
matched_skills: Master's degree in Management & Entrepreneurship (Leuphana University)
Project design and implementation experience (HSBC — 6 workstreams; Hapag-Lloyd — agile delivery)
German language B1 (below required fluency level)
missing_skills: Fluent German (C1 level) — candidate has only B1
Publisher/client relationship management in gaming/creator economy
Senior Director-level seniority — candidate's experience skews mid-level PMO/coordinator
core_responsibilities: Establish contact with key gaming publishers
Develop comprehensive pitches for gaming clients
Stay up to date with gaming industry trends to attract and retain clients
Lead cooperation with Gersh (LA) and YouFirst (Madrid)
recommended_emphasis: Do not apply — gaming industry experience is domain-critical and the candidate has none
German fluency at B1 is insufficient for a role that explicitly requires fluent German
The Director seniority level requires leadership experience the candidate has not yet demonstrated at that level
The pitch development and B2B business development skills from GRG Banking are tangentially related but far from gaming context
summary: Match score is 16.7 (poor_match). This Director-level role at a gaming creator marketing agency requires fluent German, deep gaming industry knowledge, and publisher relationship experience — none of which the candidate has. The seniority level is also above the candidate's current experience. Despite some relevant project management and stakeholder skills, the domain and language gaps make this a clear non-fit. Do not apply.
